identity_preservation: Candidate preserves the same prediction-service-risk-model field identity.
qualification_evidence: model quality check passed against fixture holdout
authority_check: candidate stays within the same authority ceiling and does not expand prediction-service action rights
evaluator_independence: Independent model rollout review owns the canary decision.
canary_scope: model canary for fixture route only
monitor_window: fixture monitor active for model regression only
promotion_blockers: missing data schema and serving gates
non_claims: does not prove runtime model replacement behavior
